Soil/Rock Description: ANGULAR BOULDER, COBBLES AND PEBBLES of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND. (FILL)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and PEBBLES of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with yellowish brown clayey SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed FINE GRAINED GRANITE with widely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained, vertical joints, dipping 10°-20°, 40°-50°, 75°-85° and occasionally vertical joints.
